460 N0350A_INSLN_INJCT_DAY_NUM N0350A_INSLN_INJCT_DAY_NUM N0350A Number of Days Insulin Injections CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received insulin injections in the past seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
